# Yorick Docs — Full Documentation

> Community-driven documentation for FiveM server setup, txAdmin, security best practices, and more.
> Source: https://github.com/yorick2002/Nextra-FiveM
> Author: Yorick — https://github.com/yorick2002

## FiveM Server — Linux

### Create a FiveM Server
Guide on how to create a FiveM server using txAdmin on Linux (Ubuntu, Debian, Fedora, CentOS, Arch). Covers downloading artifacts, extracting, running FXServer, and configuring txAdmin with a Cfx license key.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Server/Linux/Create-server

### Database Setup (Linux)
Guide on how to setup MariaDB on a Linux machine for your FiveM server.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Server/Linux/Database

### Domain Setup (Linux)
Guide on how to point a domain to your FiveM Linux server.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Server/Linux/Domain-setup

### Resources (Linux)
Guide on how to install and manage resources on your Linux FiveM server.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Server/Linux/Resources

### Auto-update (Linux)
Guide on how to auto-update your Linux FiveM server artifacts.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Server/Linux/Auto-update

## FiveM Server — Windows

### Create a FiveM Server
Guide on how to create a FiveM server using txAdmin on Windows. Covers downloading artifacts, installing, and configuring txAdmin with a Cfx license key.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Server/Windows/Create-server

### Database Setup (Windows)
Guide on how to install MariaDB and HeidiSQL on Windows for your FiveM server.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Server/Windows/Database

### Portforwarding
Guide on how to port forward your FiveM server including Windows Firewall and router configuration.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Server/Windows/Portforwarding

### Resources (Windows)
Guide on how to install and manage resources on your Windows FiveM server.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Server/Windows/Resources

### Server Banner
Guide on how to set up a server banner for your FiveM server.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Server/Windows/Server-Banner

### WinRAR
Guide on WinRAR usage for FiveM server files.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Server/Windows/Winrar

## FiveM Client

### Update Channel
Guide on how to change the FiveM client update channel.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/FiveM/Client/Update-Channel

## txAdmin

### Bot Setup
Guide on how to set up a txAdmin Discord bot.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/txAdmin/Bot

### Create Account
Guide on how to create a txAdmin account.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/txAdmin/Create-account

### Master Account
Guide on how to manage the txAdmin master account.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/txAdmin/Master-Account

### Update txAdmin
Guide on how to update txAdmin.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/txAdmin/Update

## General

### XAMPP
Guide on uninstalling XAMPP and migrating to a proper database setup.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/General/Xampp

## Security

### Backdoors
Guide on identifying and removing backdoors from FiveM resources.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/Security/Backdoors

### Sandboxing
Guide on sandboxing practices for FiveM server security.
URL: https://docs.yorick.gg/Security/Sandboxing
